productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men White Slim Fit Shirt
description: Style Note The addition of refined details in this casual staple elevates this cotton shirt above the ordinary. Incorporating this season's hottest trends from the runway into your wardrobe, this shirt tops our weekend wear wish list! Style it with jeans and casual shoes. Product Details White shirt, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, branding appliqued on the pocket and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not, wring, scrub or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Size and Fit arrow Manhattan fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18') is wearing a size 40
